errors.remediation: Check champion history, target run gate status, and rollback/promotion permissions.

errors.message: Rate limit exceeded
errors.remediation: Wait for the current rate-limit window to reset or use a key with an appropriate policy.

errors.message: Request validation failed
errors.remediation: Fix the fields identified in details and retry.
